# Q5 distinct hosts targeted per user (failed logon bruteforce)

**Dataset**: `gx_05_auth` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Failed-logon brute-force detection — count failures per source/account. Q5 distinct hosts targeted per user. `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`).

```sql
dataset = gx_05_auth | filter outcome = "failure" | comp count_distinct(host) as distinct_hosts, count() as failures by user | sort desc failures
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
